testcase.name: @AfterClass afterClass
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchSessionException: Session ID is null. Using WebDriver after calling quit()? Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.1' Driver info:
